DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SA CHALLENGER, INC., A MINNESOTA CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 13, 2012 AT 9:30 AM TO BE HEARD IN DEPT. 501 BECAUSE THE CROSS-COMPLAINT ALLEGES A WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE AND THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES MATTERS PERTAINING TO FORECLOSURES. IN ADDITION, THE MOVING PARTY NEEDS TO PROVIDE A COMPLETE COPY OF THE DAL BELLO DECLARATION. PETITIONER FAILED TO INCLUDE THE ATTACHMENTS. THAT DECLARATION WITH ATTACHMENTS NEEDS TO BE PROVIDED TO DEPARTMENT 501 BY NOVEMBER 5 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY COMPLAINT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN ITS BURDEN UNDER CCP 1281.2 AND PLEAD PRIOR DEMAND FOR ARBITRATION AND REFUSAL TO ARBITRATE. E-MAIL SUBMITTED IN REPLY DOES NOT CONSTITUTE DEMAND. PREVAILING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE KAY TSENIN, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

Renewed Motion To Compel Arb And Stay Complt
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF SA CHALLENGER, INC., A MINNESOTA CORPORATION's Renewed Motion To Compel Arbitration is granted. Request to bifurcate/sever cross-complaint denied. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Continued To Jan-30-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Pam Tsao of Katten Muchin Rosenman LLP (310-788-4560) appearing for plaintiff SA Challenger moving party. No other appearance.

Tentative ruling is adopted as follow: Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Complaint is DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff failed to sustain its burden under CCP 1281.2 and plead prior demand for arbitration and refusal to arbitrate. E-mail submitted in Reply does not constitute demand. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Kay Tsenin, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (KS/501)

Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Continued To Nov-13-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Complaint is continued to November 13, 2012 AT 9:30 AM to be heard in Dept. 501 because the cross-complaint alleges a wrongful foreclosure and that department handles matters pertaining to foreclosures. In addition, the moving party needs to provide a complete copy of the Dal Bello declaration. Petitioner failed to include the attachments. That declaration with attachments needs to be provided to department 501 by November 5 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF SA CHALLENGER, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Complaint -
This motion will be heard at 9:30am in Department 302 in the Law and Motion calendar. Pro Tem Judge: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/JPT
